SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-30-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-30-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELAN CONSUELLA LAMBERT. PLAINTIFF SUZANNE BUI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YAJAIRA LISSETT GAMBOA IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELAN LAMBERT; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUI, SUZANNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GAMBOA, YAJAIRA LISSETT ALL EXHIBITS ARE HEREBY ADMITTED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
